title: ctenodon weberbaueri
intro: Ctenodon weberbaueri is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenodon weberbaueri are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Ctenodon weberbaueri can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
